arts.ttl: 'Leeds feel the full force of Fratton Park!' | Bishop opens scoring for Portsmouth
arts.sum: Portsmouth finally opened the scoring against Championship leaders Leeds United thanks to Colby Bishop.

arts.ttl: 'Ritchie is very, very lucky' | Should Leeds have been awarded a penalty?
arts.sum: Leeds United felt they should have had a penalty following Matt Ritchie's tackle on Dan James.

arts.ttl: No room for newcomer as Portsmouth boss makes one change for clash with table-topping Leeds
arts.sum: Pompey have made one change to the side tasked with taking on Championship leaders Leeds.

arts.ttl: Leeds United team news vs Portsmouth as Joe Rothwell axed from starting XI
arts.sum: Starting XI: Meslier; Bogle, Rodon, Struijk, Firpo; Gruev, Tanaka; James, Aaronson, Solomon; Piroe. Daniel Farke has opted to field Ilia Gruev in his Leeds United line-up to take on Portsmouth this afternoon, meaning Joe Rothwell is rotated out to the bench again.

arts.ttl: Leeds early team news pre-Portsmouth, Aaronson call?
arts.sum: Leeds United’s starting lineup announcement versus Portsmouth is imminent and there could be changes made to the side that drew to West Brom last time out. Leeds team news: Patrick Bamford close to return, Ampadu and Wöber boosts

arts.ttl: 'In great spirits' - Update provided on Nottingham Forest hero who helped Portsmouth
arts.sum: Stuart Pearce is in ‘great spirits’ after suffering a medical emergency.

arts.ttl: Departing Leeds United chief 'plots' Elland Road raid ahead of Premier League switch
arts.sum: Departing chief executive Angus Kinnear is planning on taking some of his Leeds United backroom team with him to Everton. Chairman Paraag Marathe paid tribute to Kinnear in a statement on the club website: “I want to thank Angus for his commitment and service for so many years, and for being a fantastic steward and leader of the club.

arts.ttl: Portsmouth boss signifies importance of hostile Fratton Park as Blues face ‘best in the league' Leeds United
arts.sum: John Mousinho is adamant Pompey must utilise Fratton Park’s hostility as face league leaders Leeds this afternoon.

arts.ttl: LIVE Portsmouth v Leeds United: build-up and live updates from Fratton Park
arts.sum: Good morning Pompey fans, as we gear up for the arrival of Championship leaders Leeds United.

arts.ttl: What Burnley and Sheffield United results mean for Leeds United in Championship promotion race
arts.sum: Like Sheffield United, Burnley have also now played a game more than Leeds. Just goal difference now separates the Blades in second and leaders Leeds, though Wilder's men have played a game more.
